scripts.util:format: bunx @biomejs/biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false AGENTS.md README.md biome.json commitlint.config.js lint-staged.config.js package.json scripts .cargo && cargo fmt --all --check
scripts.util:lint: bunx @biomejs/biome lint AGENTS.md README.md biome.json commitlint.config.js lint-staged.config.js package.json scripts .cargo --max-diagnostics 500 && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.util:check: STATUS=0; bun run util:format || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint || STATUS=1; bun run util:types || STATUS=1; bun run util:test || STATUS=1; bun run util:bench:smoke || STATUS=1; bun run build || STATUS=1; exit $STATUS
